YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHI_CAN_POWER.title: Cripple
YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHI_CAN_POWER.description: Crippled creatures lose additional HP equal to their Cripple stacks when taking damage.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHI_CAN_POWER.smartDescri: When taking damage, lose an additional {Amount} HP.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_LIU_XUE_POWER.title: Bleed
YUNO_MOD_POWER_LIU_XUE_POWER.description: Bleeding creatures take damage equal to their Bleed stacks after attacking.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_LOVE_POWER.title: Love
YUNO_MOD_POWER_LOVE_POWER.description: Maximum 10 stacks. At the end of your turn, gain Block equal to half your Love stacks. At 10 stacks, reset to 0 and gain 5 Block.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_LOVE_POWER.smartDescripti: At the end of your turn, gain Block equal to half your Love stacks. At 10 stacks, consume 10 stacks and gain 5 Block.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DIARY_POWER.title: Diaries Held
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DIARY_POWER.description: The number of Diaries you possess. Gain staged bonuses based on the amount.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DIARY_POWER.smartDescript:
Currently holding {Amount} Diaries.
1: At combat start, gain {Amount} Block.
2: At combat start, gain 1 Strength.
3: At combat start, gain 1 Dexterity.
5: At turn start, apply 1 Poison to ALL enemies.
7: At combat start, draw 2 cards.
9: At the start of round 2, add 1 Knowledgeable to your draw pile.
12: At the start of round 3, add 1 Myriad Samsara to your draw pile.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_CRAZY_POWER.title: Frenzy
YUNO_MOD_POWER_CRAZY_POWER.description: Deal double damage. Take double damage. Exit at the start of your next turn.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_CRAZY_POWER.smartDescript: Deal double damage. Take double damage. Exit next turn.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_BAO_ZA_POWER.title: Bandage
YUNO_MOD_POWER_BAO_ZA_POWER.description: When a monster dies, if there are no other monsters remaining, heal HP equal to your Bandage stacks, then remove this power.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_BAO_ZA_POWER.smartDescrip: When a monster dies and no others remain, heal {Amount} HP.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AXE_POWER.title: Axe
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AXE_POWER.description: Maximum 8 stacks. On exit, deal 8 damage to the enemy with the highest HP, repeated equal to your Axe stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AXE_POWER.smartDescriptio: Maximum 8 stacks. On exit, deal 8 damage to the highest HP enemy {Amount} times.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_SWORD_POWER.title: Sword
YUNO_MOD_POWER_SWORD_POWER.description: On exit, gain 2 Energy and draw 2 cards. Can only trigger once per turn.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_SWORD_POWER.smartDescript: On exit, gain 2 Energy and draw 2 cards. Once per turn.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DAGGER_POWER.title: Dagger
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DAGGER_POWER.description: Maximum 12 stacks. On exit, deal 4 damage to a random enemy, repeated equal to your Dagger stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DAGGER_POWER.smartDescrip: Maximum 12 stacks. On exit, deal 4 damage to a random enemy {Amount} times.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_GUN_POWER.title: Gun
YUNO_MOD_POWER_GUN_POWER.description: Maximum 6 stacks. On exit, deal 4 damage to ALL enemies, repeated equal to your Gun stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_GUN_POWER.smartDescriptio: Maximum 6 stacks. On exit, deal 4 damage to ALL enemies {Amount} times.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YU_ZHI_MENG_POWER.title: Prophetic Dream
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YU_ZHI_MENG_POWER.descrip: Cards drawn via Foresee cost 0 this turn.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YU_ZHI_MENG_POWER.smartDe: Cards drawn via Foresee cost 0 this turn.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHAN_HOU_BAO_ZA_POWER.des: When taking attack damage from enemies, gain Bandage equal to 25% of the damage × stacks. When taking damage from yourself, gain Bandage equal to 100% of the damage × stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHAN_HOU_BAO_ZA_POWER.sma: When taking attack damage from enemies, gain Bandage equal to 25% of the damage × stacks. When taking damage from yourself, gain Bandage equal to 100% × stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YI_YA_HUAN_YA_POWER.title: An Eye for an Eye
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YI_YA_HUAN_YA_POWER.descr: Enemies that damage you gain Revenge equal to stacks. When you damage yourself, ALL enemies gain Revenge equal to stacks. Enemies with Revenge take 50% more damage. When taking damage, remove 1 Revenge.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YI_YA_HUAN_YA_POWER.smart: Enemies that damage you gain {Amount} Revenge. When you damage yourself, ALL enemies gain {Amount} Revenge.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XIA_YI_GE_JIU_SHI_NI_POWE: At the start of your turn, apply Cripple equal to stacks to ALL enemies, and gain 1 Energy.
At turn start, apply {Amount} Cripple to ALL enemies and gain 1 Energy.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHE_YI_CAN_XIAN_GEI_NI_PO: You are unaffected by Weak and Vulnerable.
You are unaffected by Weak and Vulnerable.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_WEI_XIE_POWER.title: Threat
YUNO_MOD_POWER_WEI_XIE_POWER.description: Attack damage taken is stored. At the end of your turn, take damage equal to the stored amount, then remove this power.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_WEI_XIE_POWER.smartDescri: Attack damage taken is stored. Take stored damage at end of turn, then removed.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DAMAGE_STORE_POWER.title: Damage Stored
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DAMAGE_STORE_POWER.descri: Removed at the end of your turn. Before removal, take damage equal to the stored amount.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DAMAGE_STORE_POWER.smartD: Take {Amount} damage at end of turn, then removed.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XIAN_JI_POWER.title: Trap
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XIAN_JI_POWER.description: Whenever you draw a card, apply Bleed equal to stacks to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XIAN_JI_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever you draw a card, apply {Amount} Bleed to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_CUI_XUE_POWER.title: Blood Quench
YUNO_MOD_POWER_CUI_XUE_POWER.description: When you deal damage with a Dagger attack, trigger Bleed equal to stacks times.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_CUI_XUE_POWER.smartDescri: When dealing damage with a Dagger attack, trigger Bleed {Amount} times.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHAN_YOU_YU_WAN_JIA_POWER: Deal 50% less damage to enemies without Possessiveness (Enemy). Deal 50% more damage to enemies with Possessiveness (Enemy).
Deal 50% less damage to enemies without Possessiveness (Enemy). Deal 50% more damage to enemies with Possessiveness (Enemy).
Take 50% more damage from sources with Possessiveness (Player).
Take 50% more damage from sources with Possessiveness (Player).
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XUE_BAI_POWER.title: Blood Defeat
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XUE_BAI_POWER.description: Whenever an enemy takes Bleed damage, gain Cripple equal to stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XUE_BAI_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever an enemy takes Bleed damage, gain {Amount} Cripple.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AI_YI_YI_CHU_POWER.title: Love Overflow
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AI_YI_YI_CHU_POWER.descri: Love has no cap, but you cannot gain Block from cards.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AI_YI_YI_CHU_POWER.smartD: Love has no cap, but you cannot gain Block from cards.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_KAN_PO_POWER.title: See Through
YUNO_MOD_POWER_KAN_PO_POWER.description: When entering a Stance, gain Block equal to stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_KAN_PO_POWER.smartDescrip: When entering a Stance, gain {Amount} Block.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_WU_YI_ZHONG_TING_POWER.de: When entering a Stance, draw cards equal to stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_WU_YI_ZHONG_TING_POWER.sm: When entering a Stance, draw {Amount} cards.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AN_ZHONG_GUAN_CHA_POWER.d: When gaining Love, draw cards equal to stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_NI_GEI_WO_XIAO_XIN_DIAN_P: Whenever an enemy gains 1 Strength, gain Strength equal to stacks.
Whenever an enemy gains 1 Strength, gain {Amount} Strength.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_FU_CHOU_POWER.title: Revenge
YUNO_MOD_POWER_FU_CHOU_POWER.description: Enemies with Revenge take 50% more damage. When taking damage, remove 1 stack.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_FU_CHOU_POWER.smartDescri: Takes 50% more damage. Remove 1 stack when taking damage.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YU_ZHI_POWER.title: Precognition
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YU_ZHI_POWER.description: Whenever you Foresee, ALL enemies gain Strength equal to stacks, then lose twice that amount of Strength.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YU_ZHI_POWER.smartDescrip: When you Foresee, ALL enemies gain {Amount} Strength, then lose {Amount}×2 Strength.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_JIAO_HUAN_POWER.title: Exchange
YUNO_MOD_POWER_JIAO_HUAN_POWER.descripti: At the end of your turn, swap your Strength and Dexterity.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_JIAO_HUAN_POWER.smartDesc: At the end of your turn, swap your Strength and Dexterity.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_SHOU_HU_POWER.title: Protect
YUNO_MOD_POWER_SHOU_HU_POWER.description: When gaining Love, deal damage to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_SHOU_HU_POWER.smartDescri: When gaining Love, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YIN_GUO_LV_DA_DIAN_TANG_P: At the start of your turn, add an Orb to your draw pile.
At the start of your turn, add {Amount} Orb(s) to your draw pile.
